message:
test(fcp-host): expand 3 more modules via parallel subagents

cancellation.rs: 105 → 173 (+68 tests) — clone fidelity, boundary values,
serde edge cases, controller advanced scenarios, interleaved ops.

supply_chain.rs: 112 → 157 (+45 tests) — cache eviction, audit events,
digest edge cases, dev overrides, policy edge cases.

rollout.rs: 126 → 183 (+57 tests) — canary expiry, rate BPS edge cases,
priority chains, controller async tests, decision messages.

fcp-host total: 2574 pass, 0 fail, lib clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
